overrides.description: Retain every qualified Release 1220 layer, assign Release 1221, and load the bounded Kitchen laboratory
Add real-water handling, fixed Kitchen fixtures, selected cleaning/drying/heat/food/storage interactions, persistent state, and recap

preserved_canonical_state: the single canonical WATER object remains the only portable water quantity and is never cloned
the real bottle, lunch, garlic, knives, tools, actors, score, and puzzle routines remain authoritative
existing material cleaning and rusty-knife consequence state is reused rather than replaced
the Kitchen fixtures are fixed containers and surfaces whose contents remain in the canonical object tree
food preparation changes only bounded observation and authored offering context
heat is temporary and cannot grant weapon strength, tool repair, score, or puzzle bypass
excluded_scope: generic crafting recipes or a recipe economy
duplicated food, water, tools, or puzzle objects
new score or automatic puzzle completion
sub-beads or a parallel planning hierarchy
